accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text or are accurate context (50 U.S.C. 1546a / Section 1013 verified as correctly described).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the statutory citation and expedited-procedure context are accurate and consistent with the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution directs removal of U.S. forces from unauthorized hostilities within or against Iran.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the statutory mechanism (Section 1013/50 U.S.C. 1546a) the resolution invokes; the bill amends no law but the relevant statutory basis is described.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately covers the rule-of-construction carve-outs for self-defense, intelligence sharing, defensive assistance, and evacuation.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective date or deadline, which the summary correctly notes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the core directive, the statutory basis, key findings, and all exceptions.

objective_tone.why: Tone is neutral and descriptive, reporting findings and directives without editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized and internally consistent, moving from directive to basis to exceptions.

concise.why: Free of padding or repetition while covering the essential content.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the statute, codification, Operation Epic Fury, and Trump Administration as in the bill.

correct_figures.why: The February 28, 2026 date and 1984/1985 statutory year are stated correctly; no figures are misstated.
